title: M-Chips: M7 with up to 1.5 TB – and why Apple is skipping the M6
excerpt: Apple skips various models with the M6 for a very specific reason. The M7 Ultra could become an expensive chip monster.
content_html:
Apple is deviating from its previous chip strategy with the M6: From M1 to M5, there were several variants of each Apple Silicon model, but this is supposedly not planned for the M6. According to a new Bloomberg report, Apple has already started the “tape-out” of several M7 chips, a process that usually serves to finalize the chip design. According to the information, there will only be one standard M6 processor, with M6 Pro, M6 Max, or even M6 Ultra being omitted.

This would mean the M6 would only land in an entry-level MacBook Pro and possibly a MacBook Air, possibly also in an iMac and possibly in a Mac mini model – although the latter compact computer has always been equipped with a standard chip and a Pro variant recently. The reason, according to Bloomberg, is that Apple is planning major changes to the integrated AI accelerators for the M7, which apparently do not fit into the M6.

Very much RAM addressable

The first M7 is planned for the first half of 2027, according to Bloomberg. By the end of the year, M7 Pro and M7 Max will follow, and an Ultra version will follow in 2028 (which the company has sometimes omitted in recent years). With the new M7 Ultra, Apple will be able to address up to 1.5 TB for the first time since the Mac Pro with an Intel chip in 2019.

The central innovation with the M7 will be the significantly accelerated local AI capabilities. Bloomberg speaks of “significant improvements” in the integrated neural processing units (NPUs), which are traditionally called Neural Engines at Apple. Apple is apparently approaching Nvidia's Blackwell chips with this. Internally, Apple is also already working on the M8, which is also said to come with high(er)-end variants. From 2028 onwards, 1.4-nanometer manufacturing processes are planned for this. AI is no longer just “another feature” at Apple, according to Bloomberg, but of central importance.

Local AI in the fast lane

Currently, there is still a clear separation between local and cloud AI. The latter also caused the massive inflation in DRAM and NAND memory prices. Apple has been relying on local AI systems for several years, for example through the clustering of multiple Macs, but also through the use of individual machines with tools like Ollama or LM Studio.

The local use of large language models has many advantages. For example, there are no token costs, which have become rapidly pricier in recent months, and you don't send your data to the cloud for training or other purposes. Local models are also catching up significantly technically, as combinations like Hermes and Qwen show. In the foreseeable future, AI data centers may therefore be needed primarily for training and no longer for inference, which is so expensive today. Apple seems to be betting heavily on this trend.

Empfohlener redaktioneller Inhalt

Mit Ihrer Zustimmung wird hier ein externer Preisvergleich (heise Preisvergleich) geladen.

Ich bin damit einverstanden, dass mir externe Inhalte angezeigt werden. Damit können personenbezogene Daten an Drittplattformen (heise Preisvergleich) übermittelt werden. Mehr dazu in unserer Datenschutzerklärung.

(bsc)

This article was originally published in German. It was translated with technical assistance and editorially reviewed before publication.

content_html_zh:
苹果在 M6 上偏离了之前的芯片策略：从 M1 到 M5，每个 Apple Silicon 型号都有多个变体，但据说 M6 并没有计划这样做。 据彭博社最新报道，苹果已经开始了几款 M7 芯片的“流片”，这一过程通常用于最终确定芯片设计。 信息显示，标准版 M6 处理器只会一款，M6 Pro、M6 Max 甚至 M6 Ultra 都被省略。

这意味着 M6 只会出现在入门级 MacBook Pro 中，也可能出现在 MacBook Air 中，也可能出现在 iMac 中，也可能出现在 Mac mini 型号中——尽管后者的紧凑型电脑最近一直配备标准芯片和 Pro 版本。 据彭博社报道，原因是苹果正计划对 M7 的集成人工智能加速器进行重大改变，而这显然不适合 M6。

非常多的 RAM 可寻址

据彭博社报道，第一辆 M7 计划于 2027 年上半年推出。 到今年年底，M7 Pro 和 M7 Max 将紧随其后，Ultra 版本将在 2028 年推出（该公司近年来有时会省略）。 借助新款 M7 Ultra，Apple 自 2019 年配备英特尔芯片的 Mac Pro 以来首次能够处理高达 1.5 TB 的数据。

M7 的核心创新将是显着加速的本地人工智能功能。 彭博社谈到了集成神经处理单元（NPU）的“重大改进”，这些单元在苹果公司传统上被称为神经引擎。 苹果显然正在以此逼近英伟达的 Blackwell 芯片。 在内部，苹果也已经在开发 M8，据说它还配备了高端版本。 从2028年起，计划采用1.4纳米制造工艺。 据彭博社报道，人工智能不再只是苹果的“另一个功能”，而是至关重要的。

本地人工智能驶入快车道

目前，本地人工智能和云端人工智能之间仍然存在明显的分离。 后者还造成了 DRAM 和 NAND 内存价格的大幅上涨。 苹果多年来一直依赖本地人工智能系统，例如通过多台 Mac 的集群，也通过使用具有 Ollama 或 LM Studio 等工具的单个机器。

本地使用大型语言模型有很多优点。 例如，没有代币成本（近几个月代币成本迅速上涨），并且您不会将数据发送到云端用于培训或其他目的。 本土车型在技术上也显着迎头赶上，Hermes 和 Qwen 等组合就表明了这一点。 因此，在可预见的未来，人工智能数据中心可能主要用于训练，而不是如今昂贵的推理。 苹果似乎在这一趋势上下了重注。

推荐的编辑内容

我同意向我显示外部内容。 这意味着个人数据可以传输到第三方平台（heise价格比较）。 在我们的数据保护声明中了解更多信息。

(bsc)
